svg.title: Gen Code open architecture — four runtime-swappable dimensions
svg.desc: Four dimensions of openness in Gen Code: models, search, personas, skills/agents. Each dimension is swappable at runtime via slash commands.

path.style: stroke: var(--color-text-primary); fill: none; stroke-width: 1.6; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round;;fill:none;stroke:rgb(20, 20, 19);color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1.6px;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
